title: Gwangju, GJU — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Gwangju is a city in GJU with a population of 1,466,000. A cultural and arts hub in southwestern Korea, renowned for its food scene, democratic heritage, and vibrant arts district.
